title: say hello
Read Write Json File
content:
import json

# 写入 JSON
data = {"name": "Alice", "age": 30, "city": "Paris"}
with open("data.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)

# 读取 JSON
with open("data.json", "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    loaded = json.load(f)
print(loaded["name"])  # Alice

title: 数组去重
并发 Goroutine 示例（WaitGroup）
Git：常用别名和高级命令
content:
# 设置别名
git config --global alias.co checkout
git config --global alias.br branch
git config --global alias.st status
git config --global alias.unstage 'reset HEAD --'

# 清理本地已合并的分支（保留 main/master）
git branch --merged | grep -v "\*\|main\|master" | xargs -n 1 git branch -d

# 修改上一次提交信息
git commit --amend -m "新的提交信息"

# 撤销最后一次提交但保留修改
git reset --soft HEAD~1

title: Python：带进度条的循环（tqdm）
content:
# 安装：pip install tqdm
from tqdm import tqdm
import time

for i in tqdm(range(100), desc="Processing"):
    time.sleep(0.01)  # 模拟任务

# 处理列表时显示进度
items = ["a", "b", "c", "d"]
for item in tqdm(items, unit="item"):
    time.sleep(0.1)

title: 监控日志中的错误并发送警告
content:
#!/bin/bash
LOG_FILE="/var/log/app.log"
ALERT_EMAIL="admin@example.com"

tail -Fn0 "$LOG_FILE" | while read line; do
    if echo "$line" | grep -q "ERROR"; then
        echo "$line" | mail -s "App Error Detected" "$ALERT_EMAIL"
    fi
done
